## What

Brief description of the change.

## Why

What problem does this solve?

## How

How was it implemented? Any trade-offs?

## Testing

- [ ] `go vet ./...` passes
- [ ] `go test -race ./...` passes
- [ ] Flutter build succeeds (if app/ changed)
- [ ] Tested manually

## Screenshots

If UI changes, add before/after screenshots.
